title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that language choice significantly impacts AI development productivity, especially as teams scale. The video highlights how LSPs, type checking, and build-time verification catch errors earlier, and recommends TypeScript over dynamic languages like Python for AI coding to reduce runtime mistakes and development friction.
